title: Wiki Workflow Hardening
description: wiki-ingest, wiki-update, wiki-query가 실제 agent 운영에서 흔들리지 않도록 품질 계약, 안전장치, workflow CLI/MCP checkpoint를 고정하는 명세.

page.humanSummary: 다음 구현은 skill 문서와 CLI/MCP workflow를 품질 게이트 중심으로 더 단단하게 만든다.
page.agentSummary: Harden wiki-ingest/wiki-update/wiki-query so agents can execute them reliably: fix draft contract drift, prevent source-page clobbering, enforce section-level human-lock preservation, standardize query reports/capture, and add deterministic workflow CLI/MCP checkpoint commands without moving semantic judgment into code.

body.goal: agent가 각 wiki skill을 안정적으로 이해하고 수행할 수 있게 만들고, CLI/MCP workflow가 LLM Wiki의 실제 목표인 품질 높은 durable knowledge 운영을 돕는 deterministic checkpoint로 작동하도록 고정한다.
body.problem: 현재 구현은 세 skill과 publish-draft/health facade를 갖추었지만, subagent 검증 결과 일부 경계가 느슨하다. docs/agent/DRAFTS.md는 여전히 apply-draft 중심 durable flow를 안내하고, source registration은 동일 slug page를 덮어쓸 수 있으며, section-level human lock은 marker 형식만 검사하고 내용 보존을 결정론적으로 보장하지 않는다. query report/capture 형식도 agent가 매번 추론해야 하고, workflow CLI/MCP는 의미 추출까지 수행하는 것처럼 오해될 위험이 있다.

in: wiki-ingest, wiki-update, wiki-query skill 문서의 실행 가능성 강화
ingest-source source page no-clobber and duplicate handling
query report and answer-and-capture scaffold contract
workflow CLI namespace for deterministic preflight, publish, report scaffolding
MCP tools that mirror the workflow CLI checkpoint commands
usage, architecture, LLM-WIKI, AGENTS documentation alignment
out: Git commit automation without explicit user request

architecture.summary: 최종 구조는 skill이 cognition을 맡고 CLI/MCP가 deterministic checkpoint를 맡는 구조를 유지한다. 새 workflow 명령은 지식을 자동으로 작성하는 명령이 아니라, raw/source/page 상태를 검사하고, report scaffold를 만들고, 검증된 draft를 publish하는 안전한 작업 표면이다.
flow: 사용자는 새 원본 반영, 기존 page 갱신, wiki 질의 중 하나를 요청한다.
agent는 wiki-ingest, wiki-update, wiki-query skill 중 하나를 선택한다.
skill은 wiki/index.md와 관련 wiki/source/raw 자료를 읽고 semantic draft 또는 query report 필요성을 판단한다.
workflow CLI/MCP는 raw path, hash, duplicate, lock, report path, draft validation 같은 deterministic checkpoint만 수행한다.
durable 변경은 scratch/drafts/*.json을 통해 publish-draft로만 적용한다.
publish-draft는 clean pre-lint, draft dry-run, durable apply, post-lint/report, rollback을 수행한다.
agent는 변경 결과, 검증 결과, human review queue, 다음 조치를 사용자에게 보고한다.

requirements.title: Single durable publish contract
requirements.detail: durable wiki 변경의 권장 경로는 publish-draft 하나로 고정해야 한다.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/agent/DRAFTS.md는 durable apply flow를 publish-draft 중심으로 설명한다.
apply-draft는 낮은 수준 dry-run/debug 명령으로 남되, 일반 durable publish 경로로 안내하지 않는다.
usage.md, architecture.md, LLM-WIKI.md, AGENTS.md는 publish-draft 계약과 충돌하지 않는다.

requirements.title: Agent-executable skill contracts
requirements.detail: 각 skill은 agent가 별도 추론 없이 실행 순서, validation gate, report 위치, provenance 요구사항을 이해할 수 있어야 한다.
acceptanceCriteria: wiki-ingest는 source duplicate, changed hash, slug collision, source_count, provenance quality를 명확히 다룬다.
wiki-update는 section-level human lock 보존, scratch/reports와 scratch/review 라우팅 기준을 명확히 다룬다.
wiki-query는 answer-only, answer-with-report, answer-and-capture 각각의 산출물 형식과 citation 요구사항을 명확히 다룬다.
세 skill 모두 최종 completion gate로 lint --report 또는 health 성공을 요구한다.

requirements.title: Source registration no-clobber
requirements.detail: ingest-source는 기존 source page를 실수로 덮어써서는 안 된다.
acceptanceCriteria: 동일 canonical_source와 동일 raw_sha256이면 idempotent success로 처리하고 index/log 중복을 만들지 않는다.
동일 canonical_source지만 raw_sha256이 다르면 drift 상태로 보고하고, 명시 옵션 없이는 덮어쓰지 않는다.
같은 slug지만 다른 canonical_source이면 slug collision으로 실패하고 대체 slug 또는 review item을 요구한다.
target source page가 page-level human lock이면 실패한다.
ingest report는 created, unchanged, drift, collision 중 하나의 outcome을 포함한다.

requirements.title: Section-level human-lock preservation
requirements.detail: page-level lock뿐 아니라 human-locked section 내용도 deterministic하게 보존해야 한다.
acceptanceCriteria: 기존 page에 human-locked section이 있으면 draft/publish는 해당 range의 exact content가 유지되는지 검사한다.
locked section 내용이 변경되면 dry-run과 publish 모두 실패한다.
marker 순서와 짝 검사는 기존 lint behavior를 유지한다.
필요한 변경 제안은 scratch/reports 또는 scratch/review로 라우팅한다.

requirements.title: Query report and capture format
requirements.detail: wiki-query의 보고서와 durable capture는 agent마다 형식이 흔들리지 않아야 한다.
acceptanceCriteria: answer-with-report는 scratch/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-query-<slug>.md 파일명을 기본으로 한다.
query report에는 question, answer summary, pages consulted, sources consulted, confidence, contradictions, reusable capture recommendation이 포함된다.
answer-and-capture는 tools/wiki/templates/draft-upsert-page.json을 기준으로 draft를 만들고 publish-draft로만 durable 반영한다.
substantive synthesized answer에는 durable page/source citation이 필수다.

requirements.title: Workflow CLI checkpoint namespace
requirements.detail: CLI는 agent workflow를 돕는 deterministic checkpoint를 제공하되 semantic 작업을 수행한다고 주장하지 않는다.
acceptanceCriteria: workflow ingest는 raw source validation, source registration/preflight, report scaffold만 수행하고 semantic extraction pending 상태를 명시한다.
workflow update --preflight는 target page, lock state, related index/log state, suggested report path를 점검한다.
workflow update --publish는 draft를 publish-draft 경로로 적용한다.
workflow query --prepare-report는 query report scaffold를 만든다.
workflow query --publish는 capture draft를 publish-draft 경로로 적용한다.
workflow command output은 LLM semantic draft or answer required 여부를 명시한다.

requirements.title: MCP parity for workflow checkpoints
requirements.detail: agent가 CLI와 같은 품질 경계를 MCP tool로 호출할 수 있어야 한다.
acceptanceCriteria: MCP tool list에 wiki_workflow_ingest, wiki_workflow_update_preflight, wiki_workflow_update_publish, wiki_workflow_query_prepare, wiki_workflow_query_publish가 포함된다.
MCP tools는 CLI/lib behavior를 호출하고 별도 business logic을 복제하지 않는다.
MCP output도 semantic work와 deterministic checkpoint를 구분한다.

requirements.title: Verification and documentation alignment
requirements.detail: 구현 완료 판단은 테스트, lint, Stenc 검증, 문서 일관성으로만 한다.
acceptanceCriteria: python3 -m unittest tests/test_wiki_quality_baseline.py tests/test_wiki_tools.py succeeds.
python3 tools/wiki/cli.py lint --report succeeds.
python3 tools/wiki/cli.py health succeeds.
Stenc JSON validation and rendered page checks succeed.
README-level and agent-level docs do not reintroduce deprecated durable flow guidance.

approaches.name: Deterministic workflow checkpoints
tradeoffs: agent가 반복 workflow를 더 쉽게 수행한다.
CLI/MCP가 semantic extraction을 하지 않는다는 경계를 유지한다.
몇 개의 facade command와 report scaffold가 추가된다.
approaches.recommendation: Recommended. 품질 게이트를 강화하면서도 LLM Wiki의 cognition/mutation 분리를 보존한다.

approaches.name: End-to-end semantic CLI
tradeoffs: 사용자는 하나의 명령만 실행하면 된다고 느낄 수 있다.
LLM 판단, merge, contradiction 해석이 deterministic tool로 숨어 들어간다.
approaches.recommendation: Reject. 이 vault의 root cause는 자동화 부족이 아니라 품질 경계의 명확성 부족이다.

approaches.name: Documentation-only hardening
tradeoffs: 실제 source clobber와 section lock 변경 같은 위험은 계속 도구가 막지 못한다.
agent가 문서를 놓치면 같은 문제가 반복된다.
approaches.recommendation: Reject as sufficient. 문서 정정은 필요하지만 deterministic guard가 함께 있어야 한다.

components.name: docs/agent/DRAFTS.md
components.responsibility: draft가 durable knowledge가 되는 권장 경로를 publish-draft로 고정한다.

components.name: agents/skills/wiki-ingest/SKILL.md
components.responsibility: source registration, semantic extraction, draft publication, final lint gate를 agent-executable workflow로 정의한다.
interfaces: wiki-ingest 방식으로 새 원본을 등록하고 page draft를 만들어주세요.

components.name: agents/skills/wiki-update/SKILL.md
components.responsibility: 기존 page update에서 lock, contradiction, report/review routing, draft publication을 정의한다.

components.name: agents/skills/wiki-query/SKILL.md
components.responsibility: wiki 질의의 answer-only, answer-with-report, answer-and-capture 산출물과 citation 규칙을 정의한다.
interfaces: answer-and-capture 방식으로 reusable result를 wiki에 남겨주세요.

components.name: tools/wiki/lib/ingest.py
components.responsibility: raw source registration의 no-clobber, idempotency, drift/collision outcome을 구현한다.

components.name: tools/wiki/lib/draft.py
components.responsibility: draft validation and publication에서 page-level and section-level human lock을 보존한다.

components.name: tools/wiki/lib/workflow.py
components.responsibility: workflow CLI/MCP가 공유할 deterministic preflight, report scaffold, publish wrapper를 제공한다.

components.name: tools/wiki/cli.py
interfaces: python3 tools/wiki/cli.py workflow update --target wiki/concepts/example.md --draft scratch/drafts/example.json --publish --report

components.name: tools/wiki/mcp_server.py
components.responsibility: workflow CLI와 같은 checkpoint를 MCP tool로 노출한다.

dataFlow: wiki-ingest: raw source -> workflow ingest checkpoint -> source page registration or duplicate/drift report -> LLM semantic draft -> publish-draft -> health/lint report.
wiki-update: target page -> workflow update preflight -> lock/related evidence review -> LLM semantic draft or review item -> publish-draft -> health/lint report.
wiki-query: question -> wiki/index.md and relevant pages -> answer-only/report/capture mode -> workflow query report scaffold or capture draft -> publish-draft only when durable capture is requested.

errorHandling.case: DRAFTS.md or skill docs mention apply-draft as the primary durable path
errorHandling.behavior: Baseline documentation test fails and implementation must update the docs to publish-draft-centered wording.

errorHandling.case: Existing source page has same canonical_source and same raw_sha256
errorHandling.behavior: ingest-source returns unchanged/idempotent outcome and does not duplicate index or log entries.

errorHandling.case: Existing source page has same canonical_source and different raw_sha256
errorHandling.behavior: ingest-source fails with source-drift outcome unless an explicit future drift-resolution option is implemented.

errorHandling.case: Existing source page slug belongs to another canonical_source
errorHandling.behavior: ingest-source fails with slug-collision outcome and points to review or alternate slug guidance.
apply-draft dry-run and publish-draft fail before durable write.

errorHandling.case: workflow command would require semantic judgment
errorHandling.behavior: command writes a report/scaffold that states LLM semantic work is required and exits without inventing wiki claims.

contracts.name: Cognition and mutation boundary
rules: Skill = cognition: source reading, semantic extraction, duplicate judgment, contradiction interpretation, query synthesis.
CLI/MCP = mutation and validation: hashing, path checks, lock checks, draft validation, publish, lint, reports.
No workflow CLI/MCP command may generate durable semantic claims without an explicit draft supplied by the agent.

contracts.name: Durable knowledge gate
rules: Durable wiki page changes go through scratch/drafts/*.json.
publish-draft is the default durable apply path.
lint --report or health must succeed before work is reported complete.

contracts.name: Human lock contract
rules: Page-level human lock blocks direct draft application.
Section-level human lock requires exact content preservation.
Needed changes to locked content become proposed patches or review items.

contracts.name: Query capture contract
rules: answer-with-report writes a query report with consulted pages and confidence.
answer-and-capture writes a draft and publishes only through publish-draft when durable capture is requested.

surfaces.role: Draft validation and human lock preservation.

testingStrategy.expected: Fails before docs are aligned; passes when skill and draft docs preserve the publish-draft boundary.
Covers no-clobber source ingest, section lock preservation, workflow CLI commands, and MCP parity.
No issues found and a dated lint report is written.
No issues found and a dated lint report is written.

validation.purpose: Validate the paired Stenc implementation plan JSON.
Regenerate styled Stenc pages from JSON sources.
Confirm each Stenc JSON source has a rendered page.

agentInstructions: Read this spec and the paired plan before changing workflow CLI/MCP or wiki skill behavior.
Start implementation with failing tests for the specific quality risk being addressed.
Do not implement semantic extraction inside CLI or MCP workflow commands.
Keep docs, tests, CLI, MCP, and skill wording aligned in the same change set.
Run full wiki validation before reporting completion.
reviewChecklist: Every subagent finding maps to a requirement or explicit non-goal.
Workflow CLI/MCP wording cannot be mistaken for automatic knowledge generation.
No-clobber and section-lock risks are covered by deterministic tests.
Query report and capture behavior is concrete enough for agents to execute.

selfReviewChecks.name: Root cause coverage
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm the spec addresses contract drift and missing deterministic guards rather than adding convenience wrappers only.

selfReviewChecks.name: Boundary preservation
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm CLI/MCP stay deterministic and skill docs keep semantic work in the agent layer.

selfReviewChecks.name: Testability
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm every requirement can be verified by unittest, lint, health, Stenc validation, or explicit report output.

notes: Use subagent-driven implementation for independent slices when possible.
Do not start implementation until this spec and plan validate as Stenc JSON and render successfully.

supportingSections.heading: Subagent Review Findings
supportingSections.content: Four focused subagent reviews approved the direction but found contract and guardrail gaps that should be fixed before expanding usage.
items: wiki-ingest review: DRAFTS.md still points to apply-draft as the durable path, duplicate/source registration is underspecified, final lint/health is ambiguous, and provenance quality can be bypassed.
wiki-update review: section-level human locks are not deterministically protected, and scratch/reports versus scratch/review routing needs explicit rules.
wiki-query review: answer-with-report and answer-and-capture need concrete file names, required sections, draft template linkage, and mandatory citations for substantive answers.
CLI/MCP workflow review: workflow commands are useful only as deterministic checkpoints and must not claim semantic extraction, merge, contradiction resolution, or query answering.

facts.label: publish-draft
facts.value: Current publish-draft already provides pre-lint, dry-run, apply, post-lint, report, and rollback behavior.

facts.label: ingest-source
facts.value: Initial review found ingest-source wrote wiki/sources/<slug>.md directly.

facts.label: human lock
facts.value: Initial review found apply-draft blocked page-level human lock but did not compare existing and new section-level locked ranges.

facts.label: MCP
facts.value: Initial review found MCP exposed wiki_health and wiki_publish_draft but not workflow checkpoint tools.

links.label: Draft guide
links.purpose: Agent-facing draft publication flow that needs publish-draft alignment.

links.label: Ingest library
links.purpose: Source registration implementation that needs no-clobber behavior.

links.label: Draft library
links.purpose: Draft application implementation that needs section lock preservation.

links.label: MCP server
links.purpose: Agent tool surface that needs workflow checkpoint parity.
